title: Terra in the Mists
subtitle: Book One
signal: The first remembered world rises out of silence.
description: The Memoria Astra Cycle opens on a world wrapped in omen and fog, where buried memory becomes the first map toward survival.

title: Before the Mists
subtitle: Book Two
description: A descent into the vanished age that shaped the cycle, revealing the choices, fractures, and sacred technologies that came before the forgetting.

title: Crimson Reliquary
subtitle: Book Three
signal: Relics remember what empires try to bury.
description: The saga sharpens into blood, inheritance, and forbidden artifacts as the archive of the past begins to answer back.

title: Children of the Divide
subtitle: Book Four
signal: A broken frontier creates its own heirs.
description: Across the torn threshold between worlds, a new generation inherits the cost of division and the dangerous hope of crossing it.

title: Echoes of Lyra
subtitle: Book Five
signal: A song from the deep field changes the map.
description: Signals, songs, and ancient harmonics draw the cycle outward, where what was once memory becomes a living force among the stars.

title: Harmonic Rebirth
subtitle: Book Six
signal: What survives must learn to sing again.
description: After ruin and revelation, the cycle turns toward renewal as broken histories are tuned into an impossible future.

title: Foundations of Flame
subtitle: Book Seven
signal: The final foundation is made of fire.
description: The seventh volume gathers the scattered embers of the saga into a fierce reckoning with creation, memory, and the cost of beginning again.
